_comment: Android App Links for Universal-Link-equivalent deep linking. Replace the SHA256 placeholder(s) with your actual signing-cert fingerprints. Obtain via: `eas credentials --platform android` (production), or `keytool -list -v -keystore ~/.android/debug.keystore -alias androiddebugkey` (debug builds). Supports multiple entries — list both debug and release fingerprints if you want App Links verified across build variants.
